@x0Fb5x It’s a special type of 2 bit quant so the average is higher. 

The model is 400B params. That means:

- 16 bit precision is 800GB
- 8 bit is 400GB
- 4 bit is 200GB
- 2 bit is 100GB 

The extra 30GB is a way to make the quant more intelligent, additional overhead. 

1B == 2GB
